typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SET NOCOUNT ON; SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ COMMITTED; SET DEADLOCK_PRIORITY LOW;  SELECT	[ax].[ITEMID], 	[ax].[ITEMTYPE], 	[ax].[PURCHMODEL], 	[ax].[HEIGHT], 	[ax].[WIDTH], 	[ax].[SALESMODEL], 	[ax].[COSTGROUPID], 	[ax].[REQGROUPID], 	[ax].[EPCMANAGER], 	[ax].[PRIMARYVENDORID], 	[ax].[NETWEIGHT], 	[ax].[DEPTH], 	[ax].[UNITVOLUME], 	[ax].[BOMUNITID], 	[ax].[ITEMPRICETOLERANCEGROUPID], 	[ax].[DENSITY], 	[ax].[COSTMODEL], 	[ax].[USEALTITEMID], 	[ax].[ALTITEMID], 	[ax].[MATCHINGPOLICY], 	[ax].[INTRACODE], 	[ax].[PRODFLUSHINGPRINCIP], 	[ax].[MINIMUMPALLETQUANTITY], 	[ax].[PBAITEMAUTOGENERATED], 	[ax].[WMSARRIVALHANDLINGTIME], 	[ax].[BOMMANUALRECEIPT], 	[ax].[PHANTOM], 	[ax].[INTRAUNIT], 	[ax].[BOMLEVEL], 	[ax].[BATCHNUMGROUPID], 	[ax].[AUTOREPORTFINISHED], 	[ax].[ORIGCOUNTRYREGIONID], 	[ax].[STATISTICSFACTOR], 	[ax].[ALTCONFIGID], 	[ax].[STANDARDCONFIGID], 	[ax].[PRODPOOLID], 	[ax].[PROPERTYID], 	[ax].[ABCTIEUP], 	[ax].[ABCREVENUE], 	[ax].[ABCVALUE], 	[ax].[ABCCONTRIBUTIONMARGIN], 	[ax].[COMMISSIONGROUPID], 	[ax].[SALESPERCENTMARKUP], 	[ax].[SALESCONTRIBUTIONRATIO], 	[ax].[SALESPRICEMODELBASIC], 	[ax].[NAMEALIAS], 	[ax].[PRODGROUPID], 	[ax].[PROJCATEGORYID], 	[ax].[GROSSDEPTH], 	[ax].[GROSSWIDTH], 	[ax].[GROSSHEIGHT], 	[ax].[STANDARDPALLETQUANTITY], 	[ax].[QTYPERLAYER], 	[ax].[SORTCODE], 	[ax].[SERIALNUMGROUPID], 	[ax].[ITEMBUYERGROUPID], 	[ax].[TAXPACKAGINGQTY], 	[ax].[WMSPALLETTYPEID], 	[ax].[ORIGSTATEID], 	[ax].[WMSPICKINGQTYTIME], 	[ax].[TARAWEIGHT], 	[ax].[PACKAGINGGROUPID], 	[ax].[SCRAPVAR], 	[ax].[SCRAPCONST], 	[ax].[STANDARDINVENTCOLORID], 	[ax].[STANDARDINVENTSIZEID], 	[ax].[ITEMDIMCOSTPRICE], 	[ax].[ALTINVENTSIZEID], 	[ax].[ALTINVENTCOLORID], 	[ax].[FORECASTDMPINCLUDE], 	[ax].[PRODUCT], 	[ax].[PALLETTAGGING], 	[ax].[ITEMTAGGINGLEVEL], 	[ax].[DEFAULTDIMENSION], 	[ax].[FISCALLIFOAVOIDCALC], 	[ax].[FISCALLIFONORMALVALUE], 	[ax].[FISCALLIFONORMALVALUECALC], 	[ax].[BOMCALCGROUPID], 	[ax].[INVENTFISCALLIFOGROUP], 	[ax].[NGPCODESTABLE_FR], 	[ax].[ORIGCOUNTYID], 	[ax].[TAXFISCALCLASSIFICATION_BR], 	[ax].[PBAITEMCONFIGURABLE], 	[ax].[PBAINVENTITEMGROUPID], 	[ax].[PBAHIDEDIALOG], 	[ax].[PBAHIDEAPPROVAL], 	[ax].[PBAAUTOSTART], 	[ax].[PBAMANDATORYCONFIG], 	[ax].[INVENTPRODUCTTYPE_BR], 	[ax].[TAXATIONORIGIN_BR], 	[ax].[TAXSERVICECODE_BR], 	[ax].[EXCISETARIFFCODES_IN], 	[ax].[CUSTOMSEXPORTTARIFFCODETABLE_IN], 	[ax].[CUSTOMSIMPORTTARIFFCODETABLE_IN], 	[ax].[SERVICECODETABLE_IN], 	[ax].[EXIMPRODUCTGROUPTABLE_IN], 	[ax].[PACKING_RU], 	[ax].[ASSETGROUPID_RU], 	[ax].[ASSETID_RU], 	[ax].[INTRASTATEXCLUDE], 	[ax].[INTRASTATPROCID_CZ], 	[ax].[PKWIUCODE_PL], 	[ax].[EXCEPTIONCODE_BR], 	[ax].[ICMSONSERVICE_BR], 	[ax].[PDSCWWMSSTANDARDPALLETQTY], 	[ax].[PDSCWWMSMINIMUMPALLETQTY], 	[ax].[PDSCWWMSQTYPERLAYER], 	[ax].[SEMUSEROUTINGYIELD], 	[ax].[ECMTEMPLATEITEM], 	[ax].[ECMREVLEVELDRAWING], 	[ax].[ECMDOCUMENTNUMBER], 	[ax].[SEMBOMOBSOLETE], 	[ax].[SEMBOMDESIGNATION], 	[ax].[STANDARDINVENTREVID], 	[ax].[SEMFUSE], 	[ax].[SEMPUBLISH], 	[ax].[SEMMFGCOMMENTS], 	[ax].[SEMLASTORDERDATE], 	[ax].[SEMLASTSHIPDATE], 	[ax].[SEMPRODUCTLINE], 	[ax].[SEMUSEBOMQTY], 	[ax].[SEMCOMPONENTISSUEQTY], 	[ax].[SEMITEMPACKAGEID], 	[ax].[SEMITEMFAMILYID], 	[ax].[SEMBOMMANUALCONSUMP], 	[ax].[SEMPRIMARYPARTFLAG], 	[ax].[SEMDIEATTACH], 	[ax].[SEMCAPEX], 	[ax].[SEMBUSINESSUNIT], 	[ax].[SEMBUSINESSGROUP], 	[ax].[SEMLIFECYCLESTAGE], 	[ax].[SEMVERSIONID], 	[ax].[SEMSAMPLESIZE], 	[ax].[SEMEXPENSE], 	[ax].[SEMPERCENTOFLIST], 	[ax].[SEMVSOEESTABLISHED], 	[ax].[SEMCALCMEDIANPRICE], 	[ax].[SEMDEFAULTREVENUERECOGNITIONTYPE], 	[ax].[SEMOVERWRITECALCMEDIAN], 	[ax].[SEMREVENUETYPE], 	[ax].[SEMVSOEGP], 	[ax].[SEMSBE], 	[ax].[ALTINVENTSTYLEID], 	[ax].[MARKUPCODE_RU], 	[ax].[NRTAXGROUP_LV], 	[ax].[PDSBASEATTRIBUTEID], 	[ax].[PDSBESTBEFORE], 	[ax].[PDSFREIGHTALLOCATIONGROUPID], 	[ax].[PDSITEMREBATEGROUPID], 	[ax].[PDSPOTENCYATTRIBRECORDING], 	[ax].[PDSSHELFADVICE], 	[ax].[PDSSHELFLIFE], 	[ax].[PDSTARGETFACTOR], 	[ax].[PDSVENDORCHECKITEM], 	[ax].[PMFPLANNINGITEMID], 	[ax].[PMFPRODUCTTYPE], 	[ax].[PMFYIELDPCT], 	[ax].[SADRATECODE_PL], 	[ax].[SKIPINTRACOMPANYSYNC_RU], 	[ax].[STANDARDINVENTSTYLEID], 	[ax].[BDCRULESET], 	[ax].[SEMITEMPRICETYPE], 	[ax].[ITEMNAME], 	[ax].[SEMADVPLANNINGBINNINGOCCURENCE], 	[ax].[ECMREVLEVELDRAWINGALT], 	[ax].[TQMQUARANTINEREQ], 	[ax].[ADEC_ITEMCOMPGRP], 	[ax].[MODIFIEDDATETIME], 	[ax].[CREATEDDATETIME], 	[ax].[DATAAREAID], 	[ax].[RECVERSION], 	[ax].[PARTITION], 	[ax].[RECID], 	[ax].[ADEC_SINCODE], 	[ax].[ADEC_OBSDATE], 	[ax].[ADEC_OBSNOTE], 	[ax].[ADEC_NAFTA], 	[ax].[ADEC_NAFTAEXPDATE], 	[ax].[ADEC_DISC], 	[ax].[ADEC_DISCEXPDATE], 	[ax].[ADEC_COFO], 	[ax].[ADEC_COFOEXPDATE], 	[ax].[ADEC_SMMSEGMENTID], 	[ax].[ADEC_SMMSUBSEGMENTID], 	[ax].[ADEC_CPSITEM], 	[ax].[ALCOHOLPRODUCTIONTYPEID_RU], 	[ax].[ALCOHOLSTRENGTH_RU], 	[ax].[APPROXTAXVALUE_BR], 	[ax].[DAXINTEGRATIONKEY], 	[ax].[ALCOHOLMANUFACTURERID_RU], 	[ax].[ADEC_NMFC], 	[ax].[ADEC_FREIGHTCLASS], 	[ax].[ADEC_SHIPTYPE], 	[ax].[ADEC_ASMSOPICK], 	[ax].[ADEC_HAZMAT], 	[ax].[ADEC_PLANNERID], 	[ax].[ADEC_PLANNOTE], 	[ax].[BOMLEVELUPDATE], 	[ax].[ADEC_ETOITEM], 	[ax].[ADEC_ROHS], 	[ax].[ADEC_REACH], 	[ax].[ADEC_UL], 	[ax].[ADEC_CAS], 	[ax].[ADEC_KANBANPUTAWAY], 	[ax].[ADEC_BDCONSTRAINT], 	[ax].[ADEC_NONECO], 	[ax].[BATCHMERGEDATECALCULATIONMETHOD] FROM	[AX2012R2_EDW].[dbo].[INVENTTABLE] [ax] WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN [dbo].[ztmp_INVENTTABLE_IDs] [t] 	ON	( 			([ax].[ITEMID] = [t].[ITEMID]) 		AND 			([ax].[PARTITION] = [t].[PARTITION]) 		AND 			([ax].[DATAAREAID] = [t].[DATAAREAID]) 		);',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> AXSource
